description: Style Note Return to basics with this pair of black trousers from femella. You can pair them light coloured tank tops and flip flops. Accessorise with chunky jewellery for a bohemian look. Product Details Black trousers, has a zippered and buttoned closure, two insert pockets front, two insert pockets at the back, belt loops at the waist and pleats below the waistband in the front Material and Care Blended fabric Cold wash with like colours Do not bleach or wring Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
